message:
sync beads: comprehensive P1 bead review and updates

Updated all open P1 beads with:
- bd-3az0: Two-tier progressive search with indexing phase, score normalization
- bd-31z: Daemon protocol sync with actual implementation (Health/Status/Embed/Rerank)
- bd-27k: xf/cass integration with cass explanation and config format
- bd-3qov: E2E test suite with environment logging, timeout protection
- bd-p4vs: Daemon unit tests aligned with actual protocol (no LoadModel/UnloadModel)

All beads now include comprehensive unit tests, integration tests, and E2E scripts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
